title: partition_point sorted insert for UserJoined maintains admin invariant correctly
description: online.partition_point(|id| online_seq.get(id).copied().unwrap_or(u64::MAX) < sequence) inserts each UserJoined at the position that keeps the list sorted by connection_seq ascending, so online[0] is always the globally earliest-connected peer (the admin). A contributor may suggest appending to online for simplicity (online.push(pub_id)). Do not do that: UserJoined events arrive in different orders at different clients due to concurrent relay connections, so appending produces different admin elections at different peers — epoch collisions make messages undecryptable.
